mapper.select: WITH claimed AS ( SELECT id FROM runtime_outbox WHERE status IN ('PENDING','RETRY') AND next_retry_at <= NOW() ORDER BY id FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT #{limit} ) UPDATE runtime_outbox outbox SET status='PROCESSING', locked_by=#{workerId}, locked_at=NOW(), attempt_count=attempt_count+1 FROM claimed WHERE outbox.id=claimed.id RETURNING outbox.id,outbox.tenant_id,outbox.aggregate_type,outbox.aggregate_id,outbox.mutation_type, outbox.impact_hint,outbox.attempt_count,outbox.occurred_at
mapper.update: UPDATE runtime_outbox SET status='RETRY',next_retry_at=#{nextRetryAt},last_error_summary=#{errorSummary}, locked_by=NULL,locked_at=NULL WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: INSERT INTO runtime_snapshot_version(scope_type,scope_key,current_version,updated_at) VALUES(#{scopeType},#{scopeKey},1,NOW()) ON CONFLICT(scope_type,scope_key) DO UPDATE SET current_version=runtime_snapshot_version.current_version+1,updated_at=NOW() RETURNING current_version
SELECT lookup_hash FROM api_key WHERE id=#{apiKeyId} AND lookup_hash_version=1
SELECT tenant_id AS tenantId,'AUTH' AS inboundProtocol,CAST(id AS TEXT) AS tenantModelCode FROM user_account WHERE id=#{userId}
SELECT id AS tenantId,'AUTH' AS inboundProtocol,CAST(id AS TEXT) AS tenantModelCode FROM tenant WHERE id=#{tenantId}
mapper.sql: tm.tenant_id AS tenantId,r.inbound_protocol AS inboundProtocol,tm.model_code AS tenantModelCode
FROM tenant_model tm JOIN model_route r ON r.tenant_model_id=tm.id
mapper.select: WHERE tm.id=#{tenantModelId}
WHERE r.id=#{routeId}
JOIN route_target target ON target.model_route_id=r.id WHERE target.id=#{targetId}
JOIN route_target target ON target.model_route_id=r.id WHERE target.tenant_model_candidate_mapping_id=#{mappingId}
JOIN tenant_model_candidate_mapping mapping ON mapping.tenant_model_id=tm.id WHERE mapping.provider_channel_model_id=#{candidateId}

JOIN tenant_model_candidate_mapping mapping ON mapping.tenant_model_id=tm.id JOIN provider_channel_model candidate ON candidate.id=mapping.provider_channel_model_id WHERE candidate.provider_channel_id=#{channelId}

JOIN tenant_model_candidate_mapping mapping ON mapping.tenant_model_id=tm.id JOIN provider_channel_model candidate ON candidate.id=mapping.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel_credential binding ON binding.provider_channel_id=candidate.provider_channel_id WHERE binding.provider_credential_id=#{credentialId}

JOIN tenant_model_candidate_mapping mapping ON mapping.tenant_model_id=tm.id JOIN provider_channel_model candidate ON candidate.id=mapping.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel channel ON channel.id=candidate.provider_channel_id JOIN provider_base_url baseUrl ON baseUrl.id=channel.provider_base_url_id WHERE baseUrl.provider_id=#{providerId}

JOIN tenant_model_candidate_mapping mapping ON mapping.tenant_model_id=tm.id JOIN provider_channel_model candidate ON candidate.id=mapping.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel channel ON channel.id=candidate.provider_channel_id WHERE channel.provider_base_url_id=#{baseUrlId}
WHERE tm.tenant_id=#{tenantId}

JOIN tenant tenant ON tenant.id=tm.tenant_id WHERE tm.enabled=TRUE AND tm.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.enabled=TRUE AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND tenant.enabled=TRUE AND tenant.deleted_at IS NULL AND (tenant.expire_at IS NULL OR tenant.expire_at > NOW())

SELECT credential.tenant_id AS tenantId,credential.id AS credentialId FROM provider_channel_credential binding JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id WHERE binding.provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT credential.tenant_id AS tenantId,credential.id AS credentialId FROM provider_credential credential JOIN tenant tenant ON tenant.id=credential.tenant_id WHERE credential.enabled=TRUE AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL AND tenant.enabled=TRUE AND tenant.deleted_at IS NULL AND (tenant.expire_at IS NULL OR tenant.expire_at > NOW())

SELECT apiKey.lookup_hash FROM api_key apiKey JOIN user_account account ON account.id=apiKey.user_id JOIN tenant tenant ON tenant.id=apiKey.tenant_id WHERE apiKey.lookup_hash_version=1 AND apiKey.enabled=TRUE AND apiKey.deleted_at IS NULL AND (apiKey.expire_at IS NULL OR apiKey.expire_at > NOW()) AND account.enabled=TRUE AND account.deleted_at IS NULL AND tenant.enabled=TRUE AND tenant.deleted_at IS NULL AND (tenant.expire_at IS NULL OR tenant.expire_at > NOW())

SELECT account.tenant_id AS tenantId,account.id AS userId FROM user_account account JOIN tenant tenant ON tenant.id=account.tenant_id WHERE account.tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND account.enabled=TRUE AND account.deleted_at IS NULL AND tenant.enabled=TRUE AND tenant.deleted_at IS NULL AND (tenant.expire_at IS NULL OR tenant.expire_at > NOW())
SELECT id AS tenantId,'AUTH' AS inboundProtocol,CAST(id AS TEXT) AS tenantModelCode FROM tenant WHERE enabled=TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > NOW())

SELECT id AS apiKeyId,tenant_id AS tenantId,user_id AS userId,enabled,expire_at AS expireAt,deleted_at AS deletedAt, lookup_hash AS lookupHash,lookup_hash_version AS lookupHashVersion FROM api_key WHERE lookup_hash=#{lookupHash} AND lookup_hash_version=1

SELECT account.tenant_id AS tenantId,account.id AS userId,account.enabled,account.deleted_at AS deletedAt, CASE WHEN credit.balance > 0 THEN 'ALLOWED' ELSE 'BLOCKED_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE' END AS billingEligibility FROM user_account account LEFT JOIN user_credit_account credit ON credit.user_id=account.id WHERE account.id=#{userId} AND account.tenant_id=#{tenantId}
SELECT id AS tenantId,enabled,expire_at AS expireAt,deleted_at AS deletedAt,settlement_currency_code AS settlementCurrencyCode FROM tenant WHERE id=#{tenantId}
mapper.sql: SELECT tm.tenant_id AS tenantId,tm.id AS tenantModelId,tm.model_code AS tenantModelCode,tm.created_at AS tenantModelCreatedAt,tm.enabled AS tenantModelEnabled, tm.supports_streaming AS supportsStreaming,tm.default_output_tokens AS defaultOutputTokens, tm.supports_tool_calling AS supportsToolCalling,tm.supports_vision AS supportsVision,tm.supports_cache AS supportsCache, route.inbound_protocol AS inboundProtocol,price.id AS priceId,price.version AS priceVersion,price.currency_code AS currencyCode, price.input_price_per_million AS inputPricePerMillion,price.output_price_per_million AS outputPricePerMillion, price.cache_write_price_per_million AS cacheWritePricePerMillion,price.cache_read_price_per_million AS cacheReadPricePerMillion, price.effective_at AS priceEffectiveAt,price.expired_at AS priceExpiresAt,route.id AS routeId,route.enabled AS routeEnabled, target.id AS routeTargetId,mapping.id AS mappingId,channel.id AS providerChannelId,candidate.id AS providerChannelModelId, target.priority,target.weight, COALESCE(target.enabled AND target.deleted_at IS NULL,FALSE) AS targetEnabled, COALESCE(mapping.enabled AND mapping.deleted_at IS NULL,FALSE) AS mappingEnabled, COALESCE(candidate.enabled AND candidate.deleted_at IS NULL,FALSE) AS candidateEnabled, COALESCE(channel.enabled AND baseUrl.enabled AND provider.enabled AND channel.deleted_at IS NULL AND baseUrl.deleted_at IS NULL AND provider.deleted_at IS NULL,FALSE) AS channelEnabled, baseUrl.protocol AS outboundProtocol,candidate.upstream_model_id AS upstreamModelId, baseUrl.normalized_base_url AS normalizedBaseUrl,channel.connect_timeout_ms AS connectTimeoutMs,channel.read_timeout_ms AS readTimeoutMs, binding.id AS providerChannelCredentialId,credential.id AS providerCredentialId, credential.credential_version AS credentialVersion,credential.auth_type AS credentialAuthType, COALESCE(binding.enabled AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL,FALSE) AS credentialBindingEnabled, COALESCE(credential.enabled AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL,FALSE) AS credentialEnabled, COALESCE(binding.billing_account_group, CONCAT('credential:', credential.id)) AS billingAccountGroup, COALESCE(binding.quota_scope, CONCAT('credential:', credential.id)) AS quotaScope, binding.traffic_weight AS credentialTrafficWeight, binding.max_concurrent_streams AS credentialMaxConcurrentStreams, targetState.runtime_state AS targetRuntimeState,targetState.cooldown_until AS targetCooldownUntil, channelState.runtime_state AS channelRuntimeState,channelState.cooldown_until AS channelCooldownUntil, candidateState.runtime_state AS candidateRuntimeState,candidateState.cooldown_until AS candidateCooldownUntil, bindingState.runtime_state AS bindingRuntimeState,bindingState.cooldown_until AS bindingCooldownUntil, credentialState.runtime_state AS credentialRuntimeState,credentialState.cooldown_until AS credentialCooldownUntil, billingState.runtime_state AS billingRuntimeState,billingState.cooldown_until AS billingCooldownUntil, quotaState.runtime_state AS quotaRuntimeState,quotaState.cooldown_until AS quotaCooldownUntil, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider_channel_credential binding JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id WHERE binding.provider_channel_id=channel.id AND binding.enabled=TRUE AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.enabled=TRUE AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL) AS hasUsableCredential, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM GREATEST(binding.updated_at,credential.updated_at))*1000)::BIGINT FROM provider_channel_credential binding JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id WHERE binding.provider_channel_id=channel.id AND binding.enabled=TRUE AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.enabled=TRUE AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL),0) AS credentialPoolVersion

FROM tenant_model tm JOIN model_route route ON route.tenant_model_id=tm.id LEFT JOIN tenant_model_price price ON price.tenant_model_id=tm.id AND price.expired_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN route_target target ON target.model_route_id=route.id AND target.enabled=TRUE AND target.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN tenant_model_candidate_mapping mapping ON mapping.id=target.tenant_model_candidate_mapping_id AND mapping.enabled=TRUE AND mapping.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN provider_channel_model candidate ON candidate.id=mapping.provider_channel_model_id AND candidate.enabled=TRUE AND candidate.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN provider_channel channel ON channel.id=candidate.provider_channel_id AND channel.enabled=TRUE AND channel.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN provider_base_url baseUrl ON baseUrl.id=channel.provider_base_url_id AND baseUrl.enabled=TRUE AND baseUrl.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN provider ON provider.id=baseUrl.provider_id AND provider.enabled=TRUE AND provider.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN provider_channel_credential binding ON binding.provider_channel_id=channel.id AND binding.enabled=TRUE AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id AND credential.enabled=TRUE AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN upstream_runtime_resource_state targetState ON targetState.scope_type='ROUTE_TARGET' AND targetState.scope_key=CAST(target.id AS TEXT) LEFT JOIN upstream_runtime_resource_state channelState ON channelState.scope_type='PROVIDER_CHANNEL' AND channelState.scope_key=CAST(channel.id AS TEXT) LEFT JOIN upstream_runtime_resource_state candidateState ON candidateState.scope_type='PROVIDER_CHANNEL_MODEL' AND candidateState.scope_key=CAST(candidate.id AS TEXT) LEFT JOIN upstream_runtime_resource_state bindingState ON bindingState.scope_type='PROVIDER_CHANNEL_CREDENTIAL' AND bindingState.scope_key=CAST(binding.id AS TEXT) LEFT JOIN upstream_runtime_resource_state credentialState ON credentialState.scope_type='CREDENTIAL' AND credentialState.scope_key=CAST(credential.id AS TEXT) LEFT JOIN upstream_runtime_resource_state billingState ON billingState.scope_type='BILLING_ACCOUNT_GROUP' AND billingState.scope_key=CONCAT(tm.tenant_id, ':', COALESCE(binding.billing_account_group, CONCAT('credential:', credential.id))) LEFT JOIN upstream_runtime_resource_state quotaState ON quotaState.scope_type='QUOTA_SCOPE' AND quotaState.scope_key=CONCAT(tm.tenant_id, ':', COALESCE(binding.quota_scope, CONCAT('credential:', credential.id)))
mapper.select: JOIN tenant tenant ON tenant.id=tm.tenant_id WHERE tm.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND route.inbound_protocol=#{inboundProtocol} AND tm.deleted_at IS NULL AND route.deleted_at IS NULL AND tenant.enabled=TRUE AND tenant.deleted_at IS NULL AND (tenant.expire_at IS NULL OR tenant.expire_at > NOW()) ORDER BY tm.model_code ASC,target.id ASC NULLS LAST,credential.id ASC NULLS LAST
SELECT id FROM api_key WHERE expire_at > #{from} AND expire_at <= #{until}
SELECT id FROM tenant WHERE expire_at > #{from} AND expire_at <= #{until}
SELECT DISTINCT tenant_model_id FROM tenant_model_price WHERE (effective_at > #{from} AND effective_at <= #{until}) OR (expired_at > #{from} AND expired_at <= #{until})
SELECT state_value FROM runtime_projection_state WHERE state_key=#{stateKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runtime_projection_state(state_key,state_value,updated_at) VALUES(#{stateKey},#{stateValue},NOW()) ON CONFLICT(state_key) DO UPDATE SET state_value=EXCLUDED.state_value,updated_at=NOW()
